description:
Turn your computer into an AI computer

Run LLMs like Mistral or Llama2 locally and offline on your computer, or connect to remote AI APIs like OpenAI’s GPT-4 or Groq.
Changes
- fix: handle context shift setting from old app versions @louis-menlo (#5547)
- 🐛fix: modal action light mode @urmauur (#5545)
- hotfix: increase context size window does not popup first time @louis-menlo (#5542)
Contributor
